response:
source
The function initializes the sum of squares to zero and the product of cubes to one to handle empty lists correctly.
***
It iterates through each integer in the provided slice to calculate the square and cube values for every element.
***
The square of each number is added to the running total while the cube is multiplied into the accumulating product.
***
If the input slice contains no elements the sum remains zero and the product stays at its initial value of one.
***
After processing all items the function returns an ordered pair containing the final sum and the final product.
***
This implementation ensures correct mathematical results for any set of whole numbers including the edge case of an empty set.
